ground_truth.title: Business Catering Booms: New Trends and Opportunities for Restaurants in 2024
ground_truth.main_content: Business catering is booming. This year, 53% of corporate food buyers plan to increase their spending on catered meals in 2024, according to the latest ezCater data. Our 2024 Feeding the Workplace report shows that companies are exploring new use cases, like grab-and-go bites, food trucks, and recurring meals. Frequent orders and new use cases provide more opportunities for restaurants. ezCater data reveals that organizations are ordering meals more frequently and making food an integral part of the office day-to-day. The report explores popular emerging use cases like grab-n-go meals, employee meal programs with a 32% year-over-year increase, and food trucks. Survey data shows 71% of employees want involvement in ordering process, with 64% preferring individually packaged meals. Key menu features include clearly labeled allergens (42%), ability to customize items (41%), and sustainable packaging options. Corporate catering customers want delivery tracking updates (97%), with 90% more likely to order from restaurants offering this feature. The most popular catering categories are packages/buffets/bars (33%), beverages (28%), salad (23%), dessert (18%), and boxed lunches (11%).
with: This year, 53% of corporate food buyers plan to increase their spending on catered meals in 2024.
Our 2024 Feeding the Workplace report shows that companies are exploring new use cases.
ezCater data reveals that organizations are ordering meals more frequently.
97% of surveyed food-for-work buyers would like to get delivery tracking updates.
